slides.title: Kissflow Developer Hub
slides.subtitle: APIs, SDK, and custom scripting for programmatic platform access

slides.title: Developer Hub Overview
bullets: developers.kissflow.com — central hub for all developer resources
API documentation at api.kissflow.com
JavaScript SDK for custom app development
Community Developer guide for patterns and examples
GitHub repositories with sample code and SDK source
Supports multiple programming languages via REST API
slides.notes: Bookmark both developer sites for the team.

slides.title: Kissflow REST API
bullets: RESTful API with JSON request/response format
Base URL: https://api.kissflow.com (account-specific endpoints)
Authentication via API key or OAuth token
Endpoints for processes, dataforms, boards, users, groups, reports
CRUD operations on process items and dataform records
Pagination, filtering, and sorting on list endpoints
slides.notes: Walk through API docs structure at api.kissflow.com.

slides.title: API Authentication
bullets: API keys generated in Admin → Authentication Keys
Service accounts for server-to-server integrations
OAuth 2.0 for user-delegated access patterns
Keys scoped to minimum required permissions
Rotate keys regularly as security best practice
Never embed API keys in client-side page components
slides.notes: Source: community.kissflow.com > Authentication Keys, Service account

slides.title: Common API Operations
bullets: Create process item: POST with form field values
Get item status and history: GET item by ID
List items with filters: GET with query parameters
Update dataform record: PUT/PATCH record endpoint
List users and groups: GET directory endpoints
Trigger workflow action: POST approve/reject endpoints
slides.notes: Show curl or Postman example for creating a process item.

slides.title: Kissflow JavaScript SDK
bullets: Client-side SDK for custom page components in apps
Access form data, navigate pages, call platform APIs
Event handlers for component lifecycle and user interactions
Simplify no-code tasks with programmatic control
Seamless interaction between custom UI and platform data
SDK resources at developers.kissflow.com
slides.notes: SDK is for app page components — not standalone Node.js apps.

slides.title: Custom Scripting in Apps
bullets: Client-side JavaScript in custom page components
Access kf.context, kf.app, and component APIs
React to form field changes, button clicks, page load events
Call Kissflow APIs from within scripts for dynamic behavior
Server-side scripting for advanced data processing
Community Developer guide covers common patterns
slides.notes: Demo a simple script that filters a data table on button click.

slides.title: Webhooks and Event-Driven Integration
bullets: Subscribe to platform events via webhook configuration
Events: item created, updated, approved, rejected, completed
Webhook payload includes full item data and event metadata
Verify webhook signatures for security
Build event-driven architectures with external message queues
Complement polling-based API integrations
slides.notes: Webhooks are the real-time alternative to API polling.

slides.title: External Data Objects
bullets: Connect external databases and APIs as data sources in apps
Display external data in app page components
Read-only or read-write depending on configuration
Use for integrating legacy systems without full migration
Documented in Community under External data object tag
Enterprise feature for complex integration scenarios
slides.notes: Source: community.kissflow.com > External data object glossary

slides.title: API Rate Limits and Best Practices
bullets: Respect API rate limits — implement exponential backoff
Use batch endpoints where available for bulk operations
Cache frequently accessed reference data locally
Log API calls for debugging and audit purposes
Use service accounts with scoped permissions
Test integrations in sandbox before production deployment

slides.title: Developer Resources and Next Steps
bullets: api.kissflow.com — full API reference with try-it-out
developers.kissflow.com — SDK docs and getting started guides
Community Developer guide — platform-specific patterns
GitHub — SDK source and sample projects
Kissflow Academy Integrations Expert learning path
Support channel for API-specific technical questions
